title: Finite Cardinality And Bijection Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite function Bool/CNF DRAT/LRAT regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Pigeonhole-style injective total-function obstruction with independent DRAT and LRAT rechecking.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote the surjection obstruction only if it adds distinct finite-function regression pressure; keep Cantor-style infinite claims out of the corpus.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite function, injection, surjection, and bijection constraints as deterministic Bool/BV formulas.
Replay SAT witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Emit checked CNF/LRAT or equivalent evidence for finite injection and surjection refutations.
Keep Cantor diagonal, countability, Schroeder-Bernstein, and infinite cardinal arithmetic marked Lean-horizon until a no-sorry Lean route exists.
